title: My Name is Mayo
description:
If you are looking for a next generation gameplay experience and an engrossing open world environment...!!! Well, this is not that game... This is the touching story about a Mayo Jar. 

This is a clicking adventure that simulates the real-life tapping of a Mayo Jar! You will unveil its story and (maybe) you will learn from it, while you unlock 50 achievements!!Key Features
 • Unlock Random Facts!
 
• Discover the 4 different stories!
 
• Unlock 50 unique achievements!
 
• Collect the hand-made Steam Trading Cards!
 
• Compete with your friends and the world with the online leaderboard!
description_short: This is a clicking adventure that simulates the real-life tapping of a Mayo Jar! You will unveil its story and (maybe) you will learn from it!
